clues.title: Cold War Valley
clues.clue: Before Silicon Valley built consumer tech, it helped design missile systems for the U.S. Navy. Which aerospace company’s Sunnyvale division built the Polaris missile system?

clues.title: Hangar One
clues.clue: Find the enormous structure once used to house airships longer than football fields at Moffett Field. What is the name of the hangar?

clues.title: Arcade Origins
clues.clue: Which company headquartered in Sunnyvale helped launch the arcade video game industry in the 1970s with games like Pong and Asteroids?

clues.title: The Garage Myth
clues.clue: Two Steves launched a company that defined personal computing. Name the company and the two founders.
clues.answer: Apple — Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak

clues.title: Valley of Heart’s Delight
clues.clue: Before semiconductors, Santa Clara Valley was famous for orchards and dried fruit exports. What nickname did the region earn?

clues.title: Winchester Mystery
clues.clue: This San Jose mansion is famous for staircases to nowhere and doors that open into walls. What is the house called, and which firearms company funded it?
clues.answer: Winchester Mystery House — Winchester Repeating Arms
